title: Companies (Transfer of Pending Proceedings) Amendment Rules, 2017
description: Companies (Transfer of Pending Proceedings) Amendment Rules, 2017

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 142] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] iQjojh 28] 2017@iQkYxqu 9] 1938 No. 142] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 28, 2017/PHALGUNA 9, 1938 कारपोरे ट कायᭅ मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 28 फरवरी, 2017 सा.का.िन. 175(अ).—के᭠ᮤीय सरकार ᳰदवाला और शोधन अᭃमता संिहता, 2016 (2016 का 31) (िजसे इसके बाद संिहता कहा गया है) कᳱ धारा 239 कᳱ उपधारा (1) के साथ पᳯठत कंपनी अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 18) कᳱ धारा 434 कᳱ उप-धारा (1) और उप-धारा (2) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए कंपनी (लंिबत कायᭅवािहयᲂ का अंतरण) िनयम, 2016 मᱶ आगे और संशोधन करने के िलए िन᳜िलिखत िनयम बनाती है:- 1. सं िᭃ᳙ नाम और ᮧारं भ.—(1) इन िनयमᲂ का संिᭃ᳙ नाम कंपनी (लंिबत कायᭅवािहयᲂ का अं तरण) संशोधन िनयम, 2017 है। (2) ये िनयम राजपᮢ मᱶ ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख को ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। 2. कंपनी (लंिबत कायᭅवािहयᲂ का अंतरण) िनयम, 2016, मᱶ िनयम 5 मᱶ, उप-िनयम (i) के परंतुक मᱶ “साठ ᳰदन” श᭣दᲂ को “छह माह” श᭣दᲂ ᳇ारा ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएगा। [फा. सं. 1/5/2016-सीएल-V] अमरदीप ᳲसह भाᳯटया, संयुᲦ सिचव ᳯट᭡पण : मूल िनयम ᳰदनांक 7 ᳰदसंबर, 2016 कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎या सा.का.िन.1119(अ), ᳇ारा भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) मᱶ ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th February, 2017 G.S.R. 175(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 434 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013) read with sub-section (1) of section 239 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 (31 of 2016) (hereinafter referred to as the Code), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Companies (Transfer of Pending Proceedings) Rules, 2016, namely:— 1. Short title and Commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Companies (Transfer of Pending Proceedings) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Companies (Transfer of Pending Proceedings) Rules, 2016, in rule 5, in sub-rule (1) in the proviso for the words “sixty days” the words “six months” shall be substituted. [F. No. 1/5/2016-CL-V] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide notification number G.S.R 1119(E), dated the 7th December, 2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
